resourceTemplates.name: instagram-profile
resourceTemplates.title: Get Instagram profile
resourceTemplates.description: Returns public Instagram profile data, recent posts, and related accounts. Use one of `handle`, `url`, or `user_id`.

resourceTemplates.name: instagram-posts
resourceTemplates.title: Get Instagram posts
resourceTemplates.description: Returns public posts from an Instagram profile. Use `user_id` for faster results when known and paginate with `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: instagram-reels
resourceTemplates.title: Get Instagram reels
resourceTemplates.description: Returns public reels from an Instagram profile. Use `user_id` for better performance and paginate with `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: instagram-post-info
resourceTemplates.title: Get Instagram post or reel info
resourceTemplates.description: Returns detailed public information about a specific Instagram post or reel. Use either a `url` or `shortcode`.

resourceTemplates.name: instagram-comments
resourceTemplates.title: Get Instagram comments
resourceTemplates.description: Returns top-level visible comments from an Instagram post or reel. Supports pagination with `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: instagram-transcript
resourceTemplates.title: Get Instagram transcript
resourceTemplates.description: Returns transcript data for an Instagram post or reel when speech is detected. Supports `url` or `shortcode` inputs.

resourceTemplates.name: instagram-highlights
resourceTemplates.title: Get Instagram story highlights
resourceTemplates.description: Returns story highlights for an Instagram user. Use either `handle` or `user_id`.

resourceTemplates.name: instagram-highlight-detail
resourceTemplates.title: Get Instagram highlight detail
resourceTemplates.description: Returns detailed data for a specific Instagram story highlight by `highlight_id`.

resourceTemplates.name: instagram-reels-by-song
resourceTemplates.title: Get Instagram reels by song
resourceTemplates.description: Returns reels using a specific Instagram song identifier and supports pagination with `cursor`.
